benefits.description: Felt like had a little left in the tank during six week cycle; could feel its absence after stopping
Increased cardio endurance noted during cycle

protocol_notes: Completed a six-week cycle and is currently two weeks into off-cycle. Can feel the absence of MOTS-C in the off period. Notes the effect is not stimulant-like energy but rather improved endurance/reserve capacity. Describes it as: running 5 miles will feel a little easier and you'll feel like you have more in the tank.
